summary: Backend testing of new Cactus game features. Fixed critical bug in bot turn handling where game didn't end properly after cactus was called. All core features verified working.

bugs_fixed.issue: Bot turn did not call advance_turn(), causing game to never end after cactus
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed direct index manipulation to use advance_turn() which handles cactus countdown

critical_code_review_comments: advance_turn() correctly decrements remaining_final_turns and ends game when countdown reaches 0
cactus_caller_username is correctly set from player.username when cactus is called
pending_give_card is set correctly after successful fast_discard on opponent
Special cards (8, 10, J) correctly set special_card_available, special_card_player, and special_card_type

success_rate.backend: 96% (24/25 tests passed, 1 skipped due to card randomness)

context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) cactus_caller_username field displays player name, 2) remaining_final_turns countdown works and game ends properly, 3) pending_give_card appears after successful fast_discard on opponent, 4) special_card_available set for 8/10/J cards, 5) Game end scoring calculated correctly. Fixed bug in execute_bot_turn() - now uses advance_turn() for proper cactus countdown.

features_tested.cactus_caller_username: PASSED - Username correctly displayed instead of user_id
features_tested.remaining_final_turns_countdown: PASSED - Decrements and triggers game end
features_tested.cactus_turn_advance: PASSED - Turn immediately moves to next player
features_tested.pending_give_card: PASSED - Set after successful fast_discard on opponent
features_tested.give_card_transfer: PASSED - Card correctly transferred to opponent
features_tested.special_card_10_swap: PASSED - Swaps cards between players (flaky due to bot interference)
features_tested.game_end_scoring: PASSED - round_score calculated correctly for all players

flaky_tests.reason: Bot plays between assertions, modifying card positions
Depends on random cards matching discard pile

rca_of_issue.bug: Game never ended after cactus was called in bot mode
rca_of_issue.root_cause: execute_bot_turn() at line 853 used direct index manipulation instead of advance_turn()
rca_of_issue.impact: remaining_final_turns never decremented, game phase never changed to 'ended'
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Changed to use advance_turn(game_state) which handles cactus countdown logic
rca_of_issue.verification: Tests now pass - game ends properly when bot finishes its final turn after cactus
